chapter.label: Tale 208
chapter.title: The Fine Response Of An Elder To A Brother Besieged By Depression

paragraphs.text: A brother who was in the grips of depression asked an elder: ‘What am I to do; for I am assailed by doubts which say to me: “You became a monk in vain: you shall not be saved”? The elder replied: ‘You know, brother, even if we cannot eater the promised land, it is better for our bones to fali in the wilderness than for us to turn back to Egypt’.
